name: reviewer-plugin
description: Reviewer workflows for PM artifact gates, design gates, Claude handoff readiness, PRs, and architecture review.

interface.shortDescription: Review PM artifacts, design specs, Claude handoffs, PRs, and architecture risk with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Reviewer provides PM artifact quality gates, design spec and visual QA gates, Claude handoff readiness checks, PR review, and architecture review workflows for a Codex Reviewer role.
interface.defaultPrompt: Review PM artifacts, DESIGN_SPECs, visual QA evidence, a Claude handoff, a PR, diff, or architecture proposal.
